target: 9. Shadow Sickness
Haa, haa...
(Just like Totsumura-san said. Koba Mart's shutters are closed...)
…Mio.
Shin-chan…
...They even came to the funeral yesterday. The Kobayakawas...
…Yeah…
Sorry. For running out of the shop...
It's fine.
Shiori-chan... She's been acting strange lately.
Yeah, I heard she became unable to speak from the shock...
That's not it.
Eh?
Since before that... Maybe last week... she was saying something weird...
She said she saw it while catching bugs at Mt. Takanosu.

…Saw?
What?
A girl... who looked exactly like her.
...From the day after that.
At school, or on the way to school... She said she felt like she was constantly being watched...
What is that...? Like a <color=#GF_TIPS_060>doppelganger</color>...?
(Another version of yourself— I read in some book that people who see their doppelganger die, but...)
(Even if she suddenly tells me a story like that, I don't know how to react...)
That's a Shadow, of course...
...H-Hey, Mio. Who was that person again...?
It's <color=#GF_TIPS_017>Nezu-san</color>. The hunter...
What that girl said she saw. It's called the Shadow Sickness...
...Shadow...?
It's like an endemic disease passed down on this island.
Lately, there are fewer people who say they've seen it, but... It was common up until before the war.
If you catch the Shadow Sickness, you start seeing Shadows...
Those who see a Shadow die. They're killed by the Shadow.
And then, pretending to be the person they killed, they massacre everyone in that household too. That's the legend...
That's why, the sick people had Hiruko-sama exorcise them. That's what my grandpa used to say...
(He left...)
What was that...? <color=#GF_TIPS_082>That story just now</color>...
Hey, Shin-chan. I also... heard about it from my grandma when I was little...
The story about Shadows?
Yeah... Shin-chan, you didn't know?
No... but, it's just some kind of... superstition, right?
Yeah... but you see... I saw it... Onee-chan's Shadow.
Three days before Onee-chan died. We went to the garbage cleanup event at <color=#GF_TIPS_042>Omoto Beach</color> together. At that time—
Look, Mio!
Eh?
...Are you an idiot!! There's a difference between a good joke and a bad joke!!
Seeing <color=#GF_TIPS_068>Ushio's Shadow</color>...!
It's true!! But it disappeared right in front of my eyes... O-Onee-chan died three days later...!!
Ugh... I'm worried... about Shiori-chan and her family...!!
(Calm down, calm down, calm down... Take a bird's-eye view... Shadow Sickness!? What a ridiculous story!)
(But... it's a fact that the Kobayakawa family disappeared... It's also a fact that there are unknown aspects to Ushio's death...)
(Besides, not being able to believe what your cute little sister says... What color is your blood, Shinpei Ajiro!!)
...Mio. That story just now... did you tell anyone else?
Let's go to Hiruko-sama and ask about the Shadows.
Eh!?
That old man from earlier said it, right? About the exorcism... so...
Yeah, thank you, Shin-chan.
